MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion to Extend Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 3/14/2004. The Arbitration Compliance OSC is re-set to 4/15/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Court signed order.
